description: Product Description GM Apparel Men’s Trapper Hat Black TRENDY This trapper hat is attractive and cool for men, and it is easy to mix with any winter apparel in the wardrobe. WATERPROOF AND WINDPROOF The men’s trapper hat is waterproof and windproof and is perfect for snowy and windy area. We made this trapper hat with durable, weatherproof fabric for that solid feel and build. OCCASIONS Perfect for hunters, trappers or other outdoors men. Ski, snowboard, motorcycle, running, climbing, hunting, dog walking or just cold weather hat. Also suit for Party Gift Features Men’s trapper hat Made of 100% polyester Waterproof and windproof Ideal for running, camping, motorcycling, etc. Perfect gift for him One size that fits for all Deer stalker hat men Soft and comfortable
